ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "sponsors_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsors of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (e.g., one day, two days) */,
  "event_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the level of the event (international, national, etc.) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event took place */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the event (conference, seminar, etc.) */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "total_attendees" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the event is published */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_level_id") REFERENCES event_levels ("event_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sponsors_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsors_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsors_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsors_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sponsor */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* Path to the sponsor's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sponsor is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of participants) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the venue is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_levels" (
  "event_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event level */,
  "event_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the event level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the organizer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the organizer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the organizer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the participant belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the event (e.g., speaker, attendee) */,
  "is_registered" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the participant is registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the registration is paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the participant is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "event_organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-organizer relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-participant relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., abstract, presentation, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the document is the latest version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the document is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_documents_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, participant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, register, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
